questionHtml:
The rate expression for the reaction is: rate = k [NO]2[O2].

2NO (g) + O2 (g) → 2NO2 (g)

Which mechanism is not consistent with this rate expression?

meta.title: The rate expression for the reaction is: rate = k [NO]2[O2]. 2NO (g) + O2 (g) → 2NO2 (g) Which mechanism is not consistent with this rate expression?
